name: Ailite Dry Cabinet See Through GPG-60LA
description: AILITE GPG-60LA Dry Cabinet See Through is a special tool or box that can be used for storage media for your photography equipment such as camera bodies, lenses, batteries, filters, vertical grips, flashes and many more. This Dry Cabinet has a fairly compact dimension size so that it does not take up space in the room and this device or container can be used continuously to maintain humidity so that valuables such as your photography equipment can be safe from mold or other damage.

features.Key Features :: Capacity 60 liters | Internal dimensions: 42x37x48(height) cm | Power source 100v-220v -50hz | LED logo display screen | Material: 1mm thick corrugated iron | The exterior is electrostatically painted in a beautiful, luxurious and sophisticated wood grain color | There is a sliding tray | There is 01 electronic lock | Bearing glass | there is a running wheel | Weight: 16.6kg | LED logo display screen
